footer.stack: Made with Nuxt 4, Pinia, Nuxt Content and Stripe.

hero.title: Tailored essentials designed to last beyond one season.
hero.subtitle: Three silhouettes built like a real wardrobe: sharp fit, certified fabrics, and tracked delivery.
hero.socialProof: 4.8/5 from first orders: fit, drape, and perceived quality are cited first.

manifesto.quote: A concise wardrobe with sharp cuts, responsible fabrics, and effortless editorial style.

funnel.title: 3-step funnel
funnel.step1Copy: Clear art direction, strong hero, and fabric argument from the first screen.
funnel.step2Copy: Short offer, visible sizing, and concrete details to reduce hesitation.
funnel.step3Copy: Fast add-to-cart, clear recap, and Stripe checkout at funnel exit.

products.title: Signature collection
products.error: Unable to load products. Check your content files and runtime logs.

shipping.card1Copy: Orders are prepared in studio and dispatched within one business day.
shipping.card2Copy: Stress-free fitting at home with optional prepaid return label.
shipping.card3Copy: Sizing and styling support by email within one business day.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I choose my size?
faq.a1: Pick your usual size. If between sizes, choose the larger one for a softer drape.
faq.a2: France: 48h. Europe: 2 to 4 business days depending on destination.
faq.a3: Yes, returns are accepted within 30 days for unworn items with tags.
faq.a4: Yes, Stripe checkout with 3D Secure verification and end-to-end encryption.

testimonials.title: Customer notes
testimonials.quote1: The blazer fit was spot on, no alteration needed. I wear it from office to dinner.
testimonials.quote2: The trousers stay sharp all day, even after commuting. Great fabric hand feel.
testimonials.quote3: Trench arrived in 2 days, solid finishing and modern cut.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Catalog synced from Nuxt Content (7 pieces).
shop.noResults: No product matches these filters. Try another size or category.
shop.wishlistEmpty: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any product to save it.

product.sizeGuide: Size guide: fitted cut. If you are between sizes, choose the larger one.
product.shippingInfo: Free shipping above 120 EUR and easy returns for 30 days.
product.shippingDetail: Ships in 24h (except weekends). Tracked delivery in 2 to 4 days across Europe.
product.returnsDetail: Returns within 30 days. Items must be unworn and returned with tags.

success.title: Thanks for your order
